name: Laundry Fusion
desc: Send the top 6 cards of your Deck to the GY, then you can Fusion Summon 1 monster from your Extra Deck, by banishing its materials from your field or GY. You cannot activate card effects in your GY the turn you activate this card. You can only activate 1 "Laundry Fusion" per turn.
strings: Fusion Summon 1 monster by banishing materials?
